---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the dotfiles workflow or configuration
title: "[feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the change you want.

## Motivation

What problem would this solve? If relevant, explain whether this improves portability,
accessibility, recovery, or day-to-day maintenance.

## Proposed Change

Describe the expected behavior or configuration.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add any examples, links, or implementation notes.
